svg.text: One governance grammar · three meshes · the USO as shared data product · the fabric governs the seams
the mesh of meshes — coordinated centrally, enforced locally · governs the seams, not the meshes
Federated Computational Governance, applied recursively — the load-bearing beam
Tutor Agent → USO, through the fabric:
② purpose policy checked at access time
④ human approval for high-impact actions
the 4 + 1 principles of data mesh — every mesh speaks these
The master mesh = federated computational governance applied recursively.
Shared adherence is the commonality · the USO is the anchor data product · the fabric governs the seams.
